title: A Resolution waiving the rights of this Municipality of Los Baños to confidentiality of information and further authorizing the Department of finance-municipal Development Fund Office (MDFO) to disclose to Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) all information pertaining to financial transactions and history of dealings of this Municipality of Los Baños with MDFO in connection to the loan application of this Municipality to the said agency for the following sub-project: Construction of Evacuation/Mul
